title: White House launches 25 Freedom Fuel gas stations in this region
shortDescription: The White House launched gas stations, it announced on July 7, but the prices aren't much lower than the national average. See where they're located.

title: Trump-appointed judge blocks DOJ subpoena on Georgia election workers
shortDescription: A federal judge quashed a grand jury subpoena seeking a "staggering" array of information on 2020 election workers from Atlanta's Fulton County.

title: ABC accuses FCC of 'chilling speech' ahead of 2026 election
shortDescription: ABC submitted the July 6 filing as part of an ongoing FCC proceeding centered on whether 'The View' should be exempt from its equal time rules.

title: These 12 Democrats could replace Graham Platner
shortDescription: Maine Democrats would have to act quickly if Senate candidate Graham Platner withdraws from the race over sexual assault allegations.

title: Trump renews push for U.S. control of Greenland
shortDescription: President Trump renewed his call that the United States should control Greenland, criticizing Denmark’s support.

title: The Democrats who may replace Graham Platner for Senate
shortDescription: Democratic leaders are continuing to pressure Maine Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner to withdraw from his scandal-ridden campaign.

title: Trump revives call for US to control Greenland as NATO summit begins
shortDescription: President Trump renewed his call for the US to control Greenland and threatened to remove soldiers from Europe as the NATO summit in Turkey began.

title: Watch Trump's 'YMCA' dance moves, top of mind after Belgium World Cup win
shortDescription: President Trump is known for his fist-pumping dance to 'YMCA.' Belgium's soccer team also did a little dance after their last goal against the U.S.

title: Democrats pressuring Platner to step down from Maine Senate race
shortDescription: Democratic leaders steadfastly pressuring controversial Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner to withdraw from the race after a new sexual assault allegation.

title: Bernie Sanders urges Platner to drop out of Maine Senate race
shortDescription: Sen. Bernie Sanders has personally urged Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner to drop out of the race after a sexual assault allegation.

title: See inside Trump's high-stakes trip to NATO summit
shortDescription: Trump attends the NATO summit in Brussels, where leaders tackle rising security threats and alliance commitments.

title: Trump to lift sanctions on Turkey to possibly sell F-35 jets
shortDescription: Trump said he would lift sanctions on Turkey, which would could allow Ankara to buy F-35 jets.

title: Trump says Melania hates the 'YMCA' dance, which appeared at World Cup
shortDescription: Donald Trump has long done the fist-pumping "Y.M.C.A." dance, despite his wife's wishes. Belgium appeared to do it after beating USA in the World Cup.

title: Trump demands GOP take up longshot measure to pass voting reforms
shortDescription: Donald Trump's latest demand: that congressional Republicans combine voting reforms with defense spending and bring both to his desk before recess.

title: Mike Johnson's birthright citizenship threat, explained
shortDescription: House Speaker Mike Johnson and other congressional Republicans are taking aim at birthright citizenship. Many barriers stand in their way.

title: Young Castro is open to Trump deal for Cuba's future. 5 takeaways
shortDescription: The most important things Raúl Guillermo Rodríguez Castro said about dealing with Trump and the United States in an exclusive USA TODAY interview.
